title: 40 Inch Beige HOME Balloon for Housewarming Party Decorations, Large Cream New Home Welcome Balloon Letter Banner, Ivory White Sand Home Balloon Sign for House Warming Homecoming Party Decor Supplies
features: HOME Balloons for Housewarming Party Decoration: You will get 4 pieces 40 inch large beige H + O + M + E foil letter balloons banner with 1pc balloon ribbon, perfect for house warming party, new home sweet party, welcome home party decorations.

Perfect Size & High Quality: These cream white HOME balloon letters are made of high quality mylar foil, all the alphabet balloons are safe, durable, non-toxic, strong and and reusable. Just fill 90% of the balloon that could allow the balloon to expand completely.

Easy to Inflate: The gaint boho ivory white HOME party sign balloons have self-sealing valve does not need to be knotted for easy inflation and deflation. It can be inflated with air or helium. When filled with helium, the foil letter home balloons can float in the air; after filling, press the valve of the balloon to seal it. It can be reused. Do not throw away after use!

Repeated Use: The big white sand housewarming party decoration kit contains a straw that can be used to deflate the HOME foil balloon, simply insert the straw into the valve and press gently until the gas is completely expelled. After use, it can be folded and stored for reuse.

Perfect Wedding Party Decorations: These giant nude HOME balloons add so much fun and excitement to welcome home party, they also make the perfect photo prop or backdrop. Elegant neutral color foil balloons, color uniform, strong and beautiful, ideal for house warming, new home and home sweet housewarming party decorations.
description: 40 Inch Large HOME Foil Letter Balloons Kit is Perfect Gift for Boys Girls Women Men Housewarming New Home Welcome Home Sweet Party Decorations Supplies and other indoor and outdoor activities. Specifications: 🎉 Material: Aluminium Foil 🎉 Quantity: 4 pcs 🎉 Size: 40 Inch What You Will Get: 🎁 Giant Letter HOME Balloons pcs 🎁 Balloon Ribbon 1pc Features: 🎈 Super cute and pretty HOME foil letters balloon with matte texture appearances. 🎈 The alphabet HOME foil balloons are made of high-quality foil, which is safe for children and can be used multiple times. 🎈 These house warming party decoration balloons can be filled with air or helium, the latex balloons can float when filled with helium. 🎈 There are holes on the bottom and top of the letter HOME foil balloons, you can use the balloon ribbon to hang the balloons or stick it on the wall. Warm Reminder: ⚠️ Please don't over inflate the HOME foil balloons, 80%-90% is the best. ⚠️ Keep the balloons away from the flame, lemon juice or sharp objects, avoid exploding. ⚠️ Due to the light and screen difference, the item's color may be slightly different from the pictures. ⚠️ Due to manual measurement, the size and weight may have a certain error.
